seo.title: Full Service Electrician Contractors | Dallas Electricians | (469) 334-2759
seo.description: Full Service Electrician Contractors in Dallas, TX offers residential and commercial electrical services. 5-star rated, licensed, and insured. Call (469) 334-2759 for fast, reliable service.

hero.headline: Expert Electrical Solutions for Your Home & Business
hero.subheadline: Licensed, insured, and trusted by thousands. From emergency repairs to full rewiring, we deliver safe, code-compliant work with a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

featureSections.title: Safe & Reliable Home Electrical Solutions
featureSections.body: Your family's safety is our top priority. We provide comprehensive residential electrical services, from simple outlet repairs to complete panel upgrades. Our electricians are background-checked, drug-tested, and trained on the latest codes.
featureSections.cardBody: All our electricians are licensed by the Texas Department of Licensing and Regulation, fully insured, and bonded for your peace of mind.

featureSections.title: Powering Dallas Businesses
featureSections.body: Minimize downtime with our fast, professional commercial electrical services. We work with property managers, retail stores, restaurants, and offices to keep your operations running smoothly. Emergency response available 24/7.
featureSections.cardBody: We schedule after-hours and weekend work to avoid disrupting your business. Our team works efficiently to get you back online fast.

servicesPage.intro: We offer a full range of electrical services for residential and commercial clients in Dallas, TX. Every job is backed by our 5-star reputation and 25+ years of experience.

services.title: Electrical Panel Upgrades
services.shortDescription: Upgrade your electrical panel for safety, capacity, and code compliance.
services.longDescription: Your electrical panel is the heart of your home's electrical system. If you have flickering lights, tripping breakers, or need to add new appliances, it may be time for an upgrade. Our licensed electricians install top-brand panels (Square D, Siemens, Eaton) with proper load calculations and permits.
benefits: Increased electrical capacity for modern appliances
Enhanced safety with arc-fault and ground-fault protection
Reduced risk of electrical fires and code violations

process.title: Inspection & Load Calculation
process.description: We assess your current panel, measure load, and identify any safety issues.

process.title: Permit & Material Procurement
process.description: We handle all city permits and source high-quality materials.

process.title: Installation & Testing
process.description: Our team installs the new panel, connects circuits, and tests everything for safe operation.

faqs.question: How long does a panel upgrade take?
faqs.answer: Most residential panel upgrades are completed in 4-8 hours. We work efficiently to minimize downtime.

faqs.question: Do I need a permit?
faqs.answer: Yes, all panel upgrades in Dallas require a permit. We handle the permitting process for you.

services.title: Whole-Home Surge Protection
services.shortDescription: Protect your electronics and appliances from power surges.
services.longDescription: Lightning strikes, grid switching, and large appliances can cause damaging power surges. Our whole-home surge protectors are installed at your main panel to safeguard all connected devices. We offer both Type 1 and Type 2 surge protection devices (SPDs) from leading manufacturers.
benefits: Protects expensive electronics like TVs, computers, and appliances
Prevents data loss and equipment damage
Reduces fire risk from surge-related overheating
Peace of mind with lifetime warranty on select units

process.title: Site Evaluation
process.description: We inspect your panel and determine the best surge protection solution for your home.

process.title: Installation
process.description: We install the SPD at the main panel, properly grounding and bonding the system.

process.title: Testing & Verification
process.description: We test the unit to ensure it's functioning correctly and provide documentation.

faqs.question: Will a surge protector lower my electric bill?
faqs.answer: No, but it prevents costly damage from surges, saving you money on replacements.

faqs.question: How long does installation take?
faqs.answer: Typically 1-2 hours for a standard installation.

services.title: Ceiling Fan & Lighting Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert installation of ceiling fans, chandeliers, and all lighting fixtures.
services.longDescription: Enhance your home's comfort and style with professional lighting and ceiling fan installation. Our electricians handle everything from simple flush-mount lights to complex chandeliers and smart lighting systems. We ensure proper wiring, support, and code compliance.
benefits: Professional installation ensures safety and longevity
Wide selection of brands and styles available
Smart lighting integration with voice control
Energy-efficient LED options to save on bills

process.title: Fixture Selection & Consultation
process.description: We help you choose the right fixtures for your space and electrical capacity.

process.title: Wiring & Mounting
process.description: Our electricians run new wiring if needed and securely mount the fixture.

process.title: Final Testing & Cleanup
process.description: We test all functions and clean up the work area thoroughly.

faqs.question: Can you install a ceiling fan where there's no existing wiring?
faqs.answer: Yes, we can run new wiring from the panel or a nearby source to power your fan.

faqs.question: Do you install outdoor lighting?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We install all types of outdoor lighting, including security lights, landscape lighting, and patio fixtures.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Repair
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency service for outages, sparks, and other hazards.
services.longDescription: Electrical emergencies can happen anytime. Our team is on call 24/7 to handle power outages, sparking outlets, exposed wires, and other dangerous situations. We respond quickly to ensure your safety and restore power as fast as possible.
benefits: Fast response time – average 30 minutes in Dallas
Temporary fixes to restore power immediately

process.title: Emergency Call & Dispatch
process.description: Call our emergency line. We dispatch the nearest available electrician.

process.title: On-Site Assessment
process.description: We identify the hazard and take immediate steps to secure the area.

process.title: Repair & Restoration
process.description: We perform the necessary repairs and test the system before leaving.

faqs.question: What qualifies as an electrical emergency?
faqs.answer: Any situation that poses an immediate safety risk: exposed wires, sparking outlets, burning smells, power outages, or downed power lines.

faqs.question: Do you charge extra for emergency calls?
faqs.answer: Yes, there is a nominal emergency service fee. We'll provide the fee upfront when you call.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Electricians Since 1998
about.mission: To provide safe, reliable, and affordable electrical services to the Dallas community, with a commitment to integrity, craftsmanship, and customer satisfaction.
story: Full Service Electrician Contractors was founded in 1998 by master electrician John Martinez. Starting with a single truck and a vision to raise the bar for electrical service in Dallas, John built a reputation for honest work and fair pricing. Over the past 25+ years, we've grown into a team of 20+ licensed electricians, serving thousands of residential and commercial clients across the Dallas metro area.

Our commitment to excellence has earned us a perfect 5.0-star rating and recognition as one of Dallas's top electrical contractors. We invest in ongoing training, cutting-edge tools, and strict safety protocols to ensure every job meets the highest standards. Whether it's a simple repair or a complex new construction project, we treat every home and business like our own.

coreValues.title: Safety First
coreValues.description: We never compromise on safety. All work is performed to strict code and safety standards.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We provide honest advice, transparent pricing, and stand behind our work.

coreValues.title: Craftsmanship
coreValues.description: Our electricians are skilled tradesmen who take pride in clean, precise work.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: Your satisfaction is our priority. We communicate clearly and respect your home.

contact.headline: Get in Touch
contact.subheadline: Ready to start your project? Call us or fill out the form for a free estimate.
